articles.title: 昆士蘭Supernode BESS第二階段780MW (澳洲)
keyPoints: Quinbrook提交780MW第二階段环境影响审批
澳洲儲能市場持續火熱
大型電池儲能項目進展快速
articles.originalContent: Quinbrook Infrastructure Partners has submitted the 780MW second stage of its Supernode BESS to Australia's EPBC Act process for review.

articles.title: 長時儲能(LDES)快速發展 (全球)
keyPoints: 壓縮空氣、液流電池等LDES技術商業化
4小時儲能系統成為歐洲新標準
articles.originalContent: Long Duration Energy Storage (LDES) technologies including compressed air and flow batteries are commercializing rapidly.

articles.title: 能源轉型投資持續增加 (全球)
keyPoints: 全球能源轉型投資創新高
儲能和太陽能領域投資最強勁
articles.originalContent: Global energy transition investment continues to reach new highs, with strongest growth in energy storage and solar.
